name: WeSpy Reader
description: Article and WeChat album reader powered by the WeSpy Python package, saving Markdown-first captures into a local task database.

capabilities.title: Fetch article as Markdown
capabilities.description: Fetch a WeChat public-account article or general web article URL and save Markdown, with optional HTML and JSON outputs.
examples: Use WeSpy to turn this WeChat article into Markdown
Fetch this article URL and save Markdown plus JSON

capabilities.title: List WeChat album articles
capabilities.description: Fetch the article list for a WeChat public-account album URL without downloading each article body.
examples: List the first 20 articles from this WeChat album
Get the article URLs in this mp.weixin album

capabilities.title: Fetch WeChat album articles
capabilities.description: Batch fetch articles from a WeChat public-account album URL and save Markdown-first article files.
examples: Download the first 10 articles from this WeChat album as Markdown
Fetch this album and also save HTML and JSON
